label: Information Withheld (IRI)
rdfs_comment: Additional information that exists about a resource, but that is not shared publicly. Suggests that alternative data of higher quality may be available on request.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Preferred Spatial Representation (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An indication of which spatial representation best represents the dcterms:Location.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Site Number (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An identifier for a named site.
dcterms_description: Usually an institutional identifier for a specific named place as opposed to dwc:locationID, which is an identifier for the entire set of distinct information for an instance of dcterms:Location. This term differs from dwciri:fieldNumber in that dwciri:siteNumber is not related strictly to one dwc:Event. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Georeference Protocol (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A description or reference to a dwc:Protocol used to determine a spatial footprint, coordinates, and uncertainties.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Georeference Sources (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A list (concatenated and separated) of maps, gazetteers, or other resources used to georeference a dcterms:Location, described specifically enough to allow anyone in the future to use the same resources.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to separate the values in a list with space vertical bar space (` | `). Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Georeferenced By (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A name for a dcterms:Agent responsible for providing a georeference.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to separate the values in a list with space vertical bar space (` | `). Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Verbatim Coordinate System (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A coordinate format for dwc:verbatimLatitude and dwc:verbatimLongitude or dwc:verbatimCoordinates.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Material Entity Category (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A high-level, mutually exclusive classification describing the fundamental substance and origin of a dwc:MaterialEntity.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a limited, tightly controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Object Quantity Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: The type of quantification system used for the quantity of dwc:MaterialEntities.
dcterms_description: An dwc:objectQuantityType must have a corresponding dwc:objectQuantity. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Disposition (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A current state of a dwc:MaterialEntity with respect to where it can be found.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Material Entity Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A more generic classification of a dwc:MaterialEntity than dwc:preparations but less broad than dwc:materialCategory.
dcterms_description: A more generic classification of a dwc:MaterialEntity than dwc:preparations. Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Occurrence Status (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A statement about the detection or non-detection of a dwc:Organism during a dwc:Event.
dcterms_description: For dwc:Occurrences, the default vocabulary is recommended to consist of detected and notDetected, but can be extended by implementers with good justification. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Behavior (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A behavior shown by a dwc:Organism.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Caste (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A social caste of a dwc:Organism.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary that aligns best with a dwc:Taxon. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Life Stage (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An age class or life stage of a dwc:Organism.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Recorded By (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A name for a dcterms:Agent responsible for recording a dwc:Occurrence.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Reproductive Condition (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A reproductive condition of a dwc:Organism.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Sex (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A sex of a dwc:Organism.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Vitality (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An indication of whether a dwc:Organism was alive or dead at the time of collection or observation.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Identification Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category that best matches the nature of a dwc:Identification.
dcterms_description: The evidentiary basis, analytical approach, or inferential method by which an identification was determined. Values describe the dominant source of information supporting the identification (e.g., morphology, geography, molecular data, functional attributes, relationships, or taxonomic revision), independent of confidence level or taxonomic outcome. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Identification Verification Status (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A categorical indicator of the extent to which a taxonomic determination has been verified to be correct.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary such as that used in HISPID and ABCD. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Identified By (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A name for a dcterms:Agent responsible for making a dwc:Identification.
dcterms_description: When used in the context of an eco:Survey, the subject consists of all of the dwc:Identifications related to the eco:Survey. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Taxon Formula (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A pattern to use to construct a dwc:Identification from dwc:Taxon names and identification qualifiers.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.
examples: `A`; `not A`; `A ?`; `A or B`; `A and B`; `A x B`; `A cf.`; `A aff.`

label: Event Category (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A broad category that best matches the nature of a dwc:Event.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a limited, tightly controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Sampled Substrate Layer (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A list (concatenated and separated) of substrate layers sampled during a dwc:Event.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Sampled Substrate Category (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category or type of substrate sampled during a dwc:Event.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Event Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A narrow category that best matches the nature of a dwc:Event.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Field Number (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An identifier given to a dwc:Event in the field.
dcterms_description: Often serves as a link between field notes and a dwc:Event. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Protocol Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category that best matches the nature of a dwc:Protocol.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Organism Interaction Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category that best matches the nature of a dwc:OrganismInteraction.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Assay Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A type of method used in a study to detect taxon/taxa of interest in a dwc:MaterialEntity.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Assertion Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category that best matches the nature of a dwc:Assertion.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Assertion Value (IRI)
rdfs_comment: An asserted value.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Assertion Unit (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A unit associated with the value in dwc:assertionValue.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary such as the Ontology of Units of Measure http://www.wurvoc.org/vocabularies/om-1.8/ of SI units, derived units, or other non-SI units accepted for use within the SI. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Assertion By (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A name for a dcterms:Agent responsible for making a dwc:Assertion.
dcterms_description: Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Organism Scope (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A description of the kind of dwc:Organism instance. Can be used to indicate whether the dwc:Organism instance represents a discrete organism or if it represents a particular type of aggregation.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. This term is not intended to be used to specify a type of dwc:Taxon. Terms in the dwciri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Sampling Protocol (IRI)
rdfs_comment: The methods or protocols used during a dwc:Event, denoted by an IRI.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to describe a dwc:Event with no more than one sampling protocol. In the case of a summary dwc:Event in which a specific protocol can not be attributed to specific dwc:Occurrences, the recommended best practice is to repeat the property for each IRI that denotes a different sampling protocol that applies to the dwc:Occurrence.
